title: Sharing News

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two switches
record:
a leading question on one switch  
a response on the other

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Decide with the switch user what news they want to share.
2. Record a leading question on one switch e.g. "guess what I did yesterday?"
3. Record the response on the other switch, e.g. "I went to the beach, it was so much fun!"
4. You can add another question after the response to keep things going, e.g. "what did you get up to?"

tooltipText: Activate 2 switches to share news and ask questions
